message:
test(cell): add 25 tests for SGR param handling and HyperlinkRegistry (bd-2x9ki)

Cover: all SGR flag set/remove cycles (dim, underline variants, blink,
inverse, hidden, strikethrough, overline, bold+dim joint removal),
bright fg/bg colors (90-97, 100-107), underline color set/reset (58/59),
multiple params in one call, unknown/truncated extended color handling,
indexed/rgb clamping to 255, and HyperlinkRegistry (intern empty,
get zero/invalid, contains, len/is_empty, clear, release/acquire
no-ops for zero/invalid IDs, with_attrs constructor).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
